import React from'react';import*as XLSX from'xlsx';import toast from'react-hot-toast';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function ExportButton(_ref){let{data,filename,buttonText="Export to Excel"}=_ref;const exportToExcel=()=>{if(!data||data.length===0){toast.error('No data to export');return;}try{// Create a new workbook
const wb=XLSX.utils.book_new();// Convert data to worksheet
const ws=XLSX.utils.json_to_sheet(data);// Add worksheet to workbook
XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb,ws,'Attendance');// Generate file name with timestamp
const timestamp=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];const fileName="".concat(filename,"_").concat(timestamp,".xlsx");// Save file
XLSX.writeFile(wb,fileName);toast.success('Exported successfully!');}catch(error){console.error('Export error:',error);toast.error('Failed to export data');}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("button",{className:"btn-export",onClick:exportToExcel,title:"Export to Excel",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fas fa-file-excel"})," ",buttonText]});}export default ExportButton;
